summary: The Goshen Township Board of Zoning Appeals (BZA) held a public hearing on case BZA 2025-010, a conditional use request to allow the Goshen School Board to use a former Kindercare building at 6400 Patricia Boulevard as government offices in an R3 zoning district. The staff recommended approval, noting less traffic than the previous daycare use and no adverse impacts. No public comments were received for or against. The BZA approved the conditional use and also approved a variance suspending the requirement that the use not have primary access from a residential street, since the driveway was pre-existing.
decisions: Approved minutes from July 21, 2025 BZA meeting
Approved conditional use BZA 2025-010 for government offices at 6400 Patricia Boulevard in R3 district
Approved suspension of the requirement that the proposed use not have primary access on a local residential street due to pre-existing structure and driveway
Motion to adjourn at 6:56 PM carried
action_items: Zoning staff to notify board members if a September BZA meeting is needed after August 31st application deadline
John to handle next BZA meeting in place of current zoning staff member
notable_topics: Conditional use approval for Goshen School Board government offices at former Kindercare building
Traffic impact comparison between previous daycare use and proposed office use
Variance for residential street access for conditional use
Absence of school board representative at the hearing
Previous denied Domino's rezoning request for nearby vacant parcel
Disposition of playground equipment on property
notes: This is a Board of Zoning Appeals (BZA) hearing, not a regular Board of Trustees meeting. The board members expressed disappointment that no representative from the Goshen School Board appeared at the hearing to speak on their own application. The zoning staff member mentioned they would miss the next meeting due to closing on their first house. The video title suggests the date is August 18, 2025. Transcript quality is poor with many garbled/automated transcription artifacts.
title: BZA 8-18-25
